meta.name: Amenities — The Sanctuary
meta.tagline: A clubhouse, a spa, a sky lounge, two golf courses.
meta.description: A guided walk-through of the lifestyle amenities — from the clubhouse and spa to the pools, fitness studios and golf practice greens. Useful as a high-level lifestyle pitch alongside any residence type.
meta.useWhen: Pitch alongside any residence type, or as a stand-alone lifestyle introduction. Especially useful for buyers comparing super-luxury developments in NCR.

slides.title: The Sanctuary.
slides.subtitle: A 250,000 sq ft clubhouse, conceived as a destination.
slides.body: The Sanctuary is not an amenity block — it is a destination at the heart of the residence. Designed by Rockwell Group, it carries lounges, dining, spa, fitness and play across a single landscaped axis.

images.alt: The Sanctuary — towers reflected in water

slides.title: Spa, pools and a fitness studio above the trees.
slides.body: The wellness wing is conceived by Goco Hospitality. Hammam, hydrotherapy, treatment suites, indoor and outdoor pools, and a fitness studio programmed by The Wright Fit — every detail tuned for the body's own clock.

slides.title: Two championship courses, one drive away.
slides.body: The address is The Golf Drive — the address of the residence itself. Step from the lobby to the practice greens; cross to the championship 18-hole course beyond.

images.alt: Aerial view of the site and golf course

slides.title: A short list, kept short.
slides.subtitle: What the brochure summarises — and what only a walk can convey.
